detail_html:
❤️Penang Coffee Tree Cham Traditional Coffee & Tea (CHAM 鸳鸯)

Product of Malaysia

Penang Traditional Coffee & Tea

槟城咖啡奶茶

Serving : 15 Sachets x 40g

Net Weight : 600g

❤️Golden Spot Silky Socks (XiMug) Hong Kong Milk Tea 金点丝袜奶茶

Enjoy a cup of smoothy and tasty Silky Socks (Ximug) 'Hong Kong' milk tea. It could be served in hot or cold!

Preparation Method

Pour the Gold Spot XIMUG milk tea into a cup，add 180ML hot water, stir and served

Ingredients:

Instant Tea Powder Ximug, Non Dairy Creamer, Milk Powder & Sugar.

成分: 即溶丝袜红茶粉，植脂末，奶粉和糖。

Serving : 15 sachets @ 40g

Net Weight : 600g

❤️ Lam Fong Hor Ka Sai 南方饼家虎咬狮

虎咬狮咖啡 目前盛行火红全马各地的太平特色饮料 “虎咬狮”（念Hor Ka Sai）源于太平、十八丁、古楼等北霹雳一带，是混合了麦芽巧克力和顶级醇浓咖啡的饮品 由【LAM FONG BISCUITS Hor Ka Sai】 给大家帶來了极大的方便，让自己在家也可以随手冲泡一杯，顶级咖啡巧克力。 味道极好，特别香浓，又不怕太甜。

虎咬狮这特别名称的饮品是为了满足馋客咖啡和巧克力瘾二合一的特制咖啡。 味道独特，但却深得大家的喜好。

Serving :10s x 40g

Net Weight : 400g

❤️ Yee Thye 裕泰虎咬狮

Serving :10s x 40g

Net Weight : 400g

page_json.description: Experience authentic Penang coffee with Yee Thye Hor Ka Sai's Cham Coffee. This traditional blend offers a variety of instant coffee and tea options, including ready-to-drink coffee and Cham Coffee, perfect for express or standard delivery. - Lazada

title: Health & Functional Tea RYZE Mushroom Coffee USDA Organic with 6 Adaptogenic Mushrooms and MCT Oil, USA Grown Instant Coffee for Better Energy, Focus, Digestion, Immunity with Turkey Tail, Shiitake, Lion's Mane, 30 Servings
detail_text: RYZE Mushroom Coffee: USDA Organic & Adaptogenic ☕ COFFEE, BUT BETTER: RYZE Mushroom Coffee harnesses 6 adaptogenic mushrooms for energy and focus, without jitters or crashes. It combines superfood mushrooms like Cordyceps, Lion’s Mane, Reishi, Shiitake, Turkey Tail, and King Trumpet with MCT oil and Organic Arabica Coffee. High Potency Blend 🌟 HIGH POTENCY: Each serving contains 2000mg of superfood mushrooms. The blend includes Beta-Glucans at 25%+, ensuring maximum nutritional value and health benefits. Health Benefits ✨ ENERGY, FOCUS, DIGESTION, IMMUNITY: These mushrooms have been used for centuries to support energy, focus, digestion, and immunity. The full-spectrum blend provides more health benefits faster. USA Grown & USDA Organic 🌿 USA GROWN + USDA ORGANIC: RYZE uses locally grown mushrooms from California. It is certified USDA Organic, with no additives or sweeteners. Enjoy 30 servings of delicious, high-quality coffee.

title: Coffee Break Instant Chai Tea Latte Mix (less sweet) 250g
detail_text: Revel in the divine dance between tea and milk! Now available with Coffee Break’s popular Chai Tea Latte! Ingredients: -Soluble ceylon tea powder -Small amount of sugar & non-dairy creamer -Organic powdered mixture of cinnamon, cardamom, clove and peppercorn Instructions: 1) Add 5 TABLESPOONS of powder to 220ml hot water and stir well 2) Add sugar or condensed milk/non-dairy milk according to personal preference (add ice after that if desired) 3) Reseal ziplock properly and use contents preferably within 1 month of opening
detail_html:
Revel in the divine dance between tea and milk! Now available with Coffee Break’s popular Chai Tea Latte!

Ingredients:

-Soluble ceylon tea powder

-Small amount of sugar & non-dairy creamer

-Organic powdered mixture of cinnamon, cardamom, clove and peppercorn

Instructions:

1) Add 5 TABLESPOONS of powder to 220ml hot water and stir well

2) Add sugar or condensed milk/non-dairy milk according to personal preference (add ice after that if desired)

3) Reseal ziplock properly and use contents preferably within 1 month of opening

title: OLDTOWN Instant White Coffee Mix/Milk Tea 13/15/20 Sachet Halal - 14 Flavors
detail_text: Key Feature: Authentic White Coffee Flavor: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix and Milk tea is known for its rich and aromatic taste, which closely resembles the traditional Malaysian "white coffee" experience. It is made from a blend of high-quality coffee beans, roasted to perfection, and combined with creamy milk powder and sweeteners. Convenience: This instant coffee mix offers convenience and ease of preparation. Simply pour the desired amount of coffee mix into a cup, add hot water, and stir to enjoy a delicious cup of coffee within minutes. It eliminates the need for brewing and allows for a quick and convenient coffee fix. Creamy and Smooth Texture: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix creates a creamy and smooth coffee beverage. The combination of coffee, milk powder, and sweeteners gives it a velvety texture that enhances the overall drinking experience. Versatile Serving Options: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix can be enjoyed in various ways. It can be served hot, or for a refreshing twist, it can be poured over ice for an iced coffee treat. The mix can also be used as a base for creating coffee-flavored desserts or added to recipes that call for coffee as an ingredient. Product variations: Premix White Coffee Extra Rich 35g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Less Sugar 35g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Coffee & Creamer 25g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Cane Sugar 36g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Hazelnut 31.6g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Classic 31.6g x 15 sticks Premix White Coffee Salted Caramel 35g x 15 sticks Nan Yang Roasted White Coffee Sugar Added Nan Yang Roasted White Coffee Zero Kosong Hong Kong Style Milk Tea 13s*35g Teh Tarik 13s*30g White Milk Tea 13s*35g Product Specifications: Product Type: Instant White Coffee Mix and Milk Tea Brand: Old Town Size: 15 sticks/13 sticks Ingredients/Composition: Creamer 60%, [(glucose syrup (tapioca), vegetable fat (palm), E340ii, E451, sodium caseinate (milk), E471, E481i, salt, E551, maltodextrin 17%, sugar, cafe instantane 10% Country of Origin: Malaysia What You Will Receive: You will receive a package containing 15 individual sticks of Oldtown Instant Premix White Coffee. Expiry Date Guarantee: 6 Months Expiry Date Guarantee: We prioritize the freshness and quality of everyday products. We assure that any product you purchase from us will have a minimum of 6 months before its expiry date upon delivery. For products with naturally shorter shelf lives due to their manufacturing or preservation processes, we promise to deliver them with the maximum possible remaining shelf-life, well within their use-by dates. If any product you receive from us does not meet this guarantee, please contact our customer service team, and we will immediately address your concerns.
detail_html:
Key Feature:

Authentic White Coffee Flavor: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix and Milk tea is known for its rich and aromatic taste, which closely resembles the traditional Malaysian "white coffee" experience. It is made from a blend of high-quality coffee beans, roasted to perfection, and combined with creamy milk powder and sweeteners.

Convenience: This instant coffee mix offers convenience and ease of preparation. Simply pour the desired amount of coffee mix into a cup, add hot water, and stir to enjoy a delicious cup of coffee within minutes. It eliminates the need for brewing and allows for a quick and convenient coffee fix.

Creamy and Smooth Texture: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix creates a creamy and smooth coffee beverage. The combination of coffee, milk powder, and sweeteners gives it a velvety texture that enhances the overall drinking experience.

Versatile Serving Options: Old Town Instant White Coffee Mix can be enjoyed in various ways. It can be served hot, or for a refreshing twist, it can be poured over ice for an iced coffee treat. The mix can also be used as a base for creating coffee-flavored desserts or added to recipes that call for coffee as an ingredient.

Product variations:
Premix White Coffee Extra Rich 35g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Less Sugar 35g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Coffee & Creamer 25g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Cane Sugar 36g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Hazelnut 31.6g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Classic 31.6g x 15 sticks
Premix White Coffee Salted Caramel 35g x 15 sticks
Nan Yang Roasted White Coffee Sugar Added
Nan Yang Roasted White Coffee Zero Kosong
Hong Kong Style Milk Tea 13s*35g
Teh Tarik 13s*30g

title: Coffee Break SHY BLEND Tea Sachets (20)
detail_text: Coffee Break SHY Blend Tea Sachets (20s) Our SHY Blend Tea Dust is a custom blend of Ceylon Tea from the finest tea-growing regions around the world. Instructions: 1. Place sachet into a cup 2. a) Pour between 180ml to 200ml of freshly boiled water into cup b) For cold brew, fully submerge sachet in cold or room temperature water in a lidded cup (French Press is useful) 3. a) Wait for 3 to 5 minutes (use a teaspoon to hold down sachet) b) For cold brew, leave it to steep in the fridge for 8 - 10 hours 4. Remove sachet from cup, add sugar / condensed / evaporated / alternative milk to taste if preferred 5. Sit back and enjoy :) (Reseal zip lock bag properly and place it in an airtight container to extend shelf life. Otherwise, finish consuming preferably within 3 months of opening) Net Weight: 55g / 20 Sachets
detail_html:
Coffee Break SHY Blend

Tea Sachets (20s)



Our SHY Blend Tea Dust is a custom blend of Ceylon Tea from the finest tea-growing regions around the world.


Instructions:


1. Place sachet into a cup

2. a) Pour between 180ml to 200ml of freshly boiled water into cup

b) For cold brew, fully submerge sachet in cold or room temperature water in a lidded cup (French Press is useful)


3. a) Wait for 3 to 5 minutes (use a teaspoon to hold down sachet)

b) For cold brew, leave it to steep in the fridge for 8 - 10 hours


4. Remove sachet from cup, add sugar / condensed /

evaporated / alternative milk to taste if preferred

5. Sit back and enjoy :)


(Reseal zip lock bag properly and place it in an airtight container to extend shelf life. Otherwise, finish consuming preferably within 3 months of opening)







Net Weight: 55g / 20 Sachets

title: AS ONE WISHES | Sugar Free Instant 5D Crafted Coffee and Tea Mix Dual Hot & Cold Brew
detail_text: Instant Solubility Enjoy instant solubility with our instant tea, perfect for both hot and cold beverages. Premium 5D Carving Experience the luxury of premium 5D carving in every sip of this high-end freeze-dried black coffee. Sugar-Free Option Indulge in a sugar-free option, making it a healthier choice for tea lovers. Versatile Usage This versatile tea can be used for both hot and cold beverages, offering flexibility in your drinking habits. High-Quality Ingredients Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this tea guarantees a rich and flavorful experience.

title: GIANXI | Coffee Brewing French Press with Milk Frother and Tea Set
detail_text: Tea Brewing Set This coffee filter press pot is not just for coffee! It's also an excellent tool for brewing tea, offering a unique way to enjoy your favorite tea varieties. French Press Coffee Maker Experience the authentic French press coffee brewing method with this home coffee filter press pot. Perfect for making rich, flavorful coffee. Easy to Clean The components of this coffee filter press pot are easy to clean, making maintenance a breeze and ensuring your equipment stays hygienic. Durable Material Crafted from high-quality materials, this coffee filter press pot is designed to withstand regular use, ensuring long-lasting performance. Home Brewing Kit This comprehensive home brewing kit includes everything you need to make perfect coffee or tea at home, making it a convenient choice for coffee lovers.
detail_html:
Tea Brewing Set

This coffee filter press pot is not just for coffee! It's also an excellent tool for brewing tea, offering a unique way to enjoy your favorite tea varieties.

French Press Coffee Maker

Experience the authentic French press coffee brewing method with this home coffee filter press pot. Perfect for making rich, flavorful coffee.

Easy to Clean

The components of this coffee filter press pot are easy to clean, making maintenance a breeze and ensuring your equipment stays hygienic.

Durable Material

Crafted from high-quality materials, this coffee filter press pot is designed to withstand regular use, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Home Brewing Kit

This comprehensive home brewing kit includes everything you need to make perfect coffee or tea at home, making it a convenient choice for coffee lovers.

detail_blocks.text: Tea Brewing Set This coffee filter press pot is not just for coffee! It's also an excellent tool for brewing tea, offering a unique way to enjoy your favorite tea varieties. French Press Coffee Maker Experience the authentic French press coffee brewing method with this home coffee filter press pot. Perfect for making rich, flavorful coffee. Easy to Clean The components of this coffee filter press pot are easy to clean, making maintenance a breeze and ensuring your equipment stays hygienic. Durable Material Crafted from high-quality materials, this coffee filter press pot is designed to withstand regular use, ensuring long-lasting performance. Home Brewing Kit This comprehensive home brewing kit includes everything you need to make perfect coffee or tea at home, making it a convenient choice for coffee lovers.

title: MONGDIO | Large Capacity Cold Brew Coffee & Tea Maker
detail_text: Durable Material Made from high-quality materials, this pot is built to last, ensuring long-lasting use and durability. Versatile Use Ideal for makingiced coffee, iced tea, or even cold brew cocktails, this versatile pot is a must-have for any coffee lover. Elegant Design With its sleek and modern design, this cold brew pot not only functions well but also serves as a stylish addition to any kitchen. Large Capacity The Mongdio coffee cold brew pot boasts a generous capacity, perfect for preparing large batches of cold brew coffee or tea. Easy to Clean The Mongdio coffee cold brew pot is easy to clean, making it convenient for everyday use.

title: [Made For Drinkers] Cafe Coffee Scale
detail_text: Brew your perfect cup every time with the Made For Drinkers Precision Coffee Scale. Designed for true coffee enthusiasts, it offers 0.1g high-precision measurements to ensure consistent brewing results. The built-in timer helps you master pour-over techniques, while the silicone anti-scald pad protects against heat and provides a stable surface for your coffee gear. Its clear backlit display ensures easy reading, even in low light. Whether you’re crafting a delicate V60, rich espresso, or a bold French press, this scale delivers accuracy and control, turning your coffee routine into a professional brewing experience. Elevate your coffee game with precision you can taste.

page_json.description: Sleek and modern look for a stylish lifestyle. Lightweight build without compromising strength. Premium quality materials, durable and reliable for long-term use. Designed with functionality in mind. Multi-purpose functionality to meet diverse needs. Great value for money, practical without compromising on quality. Product Highlights51MM 53MM 58MM Coffee Dosing Ring Magnetic For Delonghi Breville E61 Portafilter Coffee Accessories Espresso Barista ToolsProduct reference: Coffee Dosing Ring Magnetic 51MM 53MM 58MM For Delonghi Breville Portafilter Espresso Accessories Barista Funnel Tool CoffeewareAvailable options: Magnetic Rose 58mm, Magnetic Black 51mm, Magnetic Black 49mm, Magnetic Sliver 58mm, Magnetic Sliver 53mm, Magnetic Black 53mm, Magnetic Sliver 51mm, Magnetic Black 58mmPlease check the selected variation for color, size, style, or specification.Product images show the available design and detail references.

title: 【Dusk123】 Coffee Bean Dosing Cup and Spoon Set Ceramic Dosing Vessel Measuring Tray Kit for Coffee or Tea Espresso Accessories
detail_text: Product Highlights 【Coffee Bean Dosing Cup Set】 It a must-have coffee accessory for measuring coffee beans, enhancing your coffee cupping and brewing experience. 【RDT Static Reduction】The spray bottle twist cap is efficient durable and easy to handle, with one or two sprays before grinding helps reduce static on your coffee grounds. Make coffee bean grinding smoother and less coffee beans splashing. 【Superior Quality Materials】The coffee bean dosing cup is made of high quality ceramic. The spray bottle is made of aluminum / glass with a capacity of 9.5ml which is optimal for humidity control. 【Elevate Your Coffee Game】This coffee dosing set is a gift for coffee lovers who want to measure and brew their coffee with precision. It is practical and easy to use, and also a thoughtful addition to espresso or coffee accessories. With this perfect coffee tool, you can add a professional feel to your espresso bar or coffee station.
detail_html:
Product Highlights

  • 【Coffee Bean Dosing Cup Set】 It a must-have coffee accessory for measuring coffee beans, enhancing your coffee cupping and brewing experience.
  • 【RDT Static Reduction】The spray bottle twist cap is efficient durable and easy to handle, with one or two sprays before grinding helps reduce static on your coffee grounds.
  • Make coffee bean grinding smoother and less coffee beans splashing.
  • 【Superior Quality Materials】The coffee bean dosing cup is made of high quality ceramic.
  • The spray bottle is made of aluminum / glass with a capacity of 9.5ml which is optimal for humidity control.
  • 【Elevate Your Coffee Game】This coffee dosing set is a gift for coffee lovers who want to measure and brew their coffee with precision.
  • It is practical and easy to use, and also a thoughtful addition to espresso or coffee accessories.
  • With this perfect coffee tool, you can add a professional feel to your espresso bar or coffee station.

detail_blocks.text: Product Highlights 【Coffee Bean Dosing Cup Set】 It a must-have coffee accessory for measuring coffee beans, enhancing your coffee cupping and brewing experience. 【RDT Static Reduction】The spray bottle twist cap is efficient durable and easy to handle, with one or two sprays before grinding helps reduce static on your coffee grounds. Make coffee bean grinding smoother and less coffee beans splashing. 【Superior Quality Materials】The coffee bean dosing cup is made of high quality ceramic. The spray bottle is made of aluminum / glass with a capacity of 9.5ml which is optimal for humidity control. 【Elevate Your Coffee Game】This coffee dosing set is a gift for coffee lovers who want to measure and brew their coffee with precision. It is practical and easy to use, and also a thoughtful addition to espresso or coffee accessories. With this perfect coffee tool, you can add a professional feel to your espresso bar or coffee station.

page_json.name: 【Dusk123】 Coffee Bean Dosing Cup and Spoon Set Ceramic Dosing Vessel Measuring Tray Kit for Coffee or Tea Espresso Accessories
page_json.category: Kitchenware & Tableware > Kitchenware > Manual Brewing Equipment
page_json.description: Great value for money, practical without compromising on quality. High utility with minimalist design. Consistent performance you can count on. Soft and comfortable for an improved user experience. Innovative design combining aesthetics with functionality. Energy-saving and eco-friendly, ideal for sustainable living. Product Highlights【Coffee Bean Dosing Cup Set】 It a must-have coffee accessory for measuring coffee beans, enhancing your coffee cupping and brewing experience.【RDT Static Reduction】The spray bottle twist cap is efficient durable and easy to handle, with one or two sprays before grinding helps reduce static on your coffee grounds.Make coffee bean grinding smoother and less coffee beans splashing.【Superior Quality Materials】The coffee bean dosing cup is made of high quality ceramic.The spray bottle is made of aluminum / glass with a capacity of 9.5ml which is optimal for humidity control.【Elevate Your Coffee Game】This coffee dosing set is a gift for coffee lovers who want to measure and brew their coffee with precision.It is practical and easy to use, and also a thoughtful addition to espresso or coffee accessories.With this perfect coffee tool, you can add a professional feel to your espresso bar or coffee station.

product.desc:
Description:
Enhance your drinking experience with our elegant clear water cup featuring a beautiful floral design. Made from premium materials, this double-walled insulated mug keeps your beverages hot or cold while showcasing real flowers encapsulated within the glass. With a capacity of 220ml or 300ml, it’s perfect for daily use and special occasions alike. The anti-scald handle ensures a comfortable grip, and the crystal-clear glass lets you enjoy the vibrant colors of your drink alongside the intricate floral details. Stylish, functional, and visually stunning, this mug makes an ideal gift for coffee and tea lovers who appreciate both beauty and practicality.
Item Name: Water Cup
Material: High Borosilicate Glass
Style: Creative
Pattern: Plain
Shape: Irregular
Applicable People: General
Structure: Double Layer
Capacity: 220/300ML
Features: Environmentally Friendly, High Temperature Resistant, Anti-scalding And Heat Insulation

product.highlights:
Crafted from high borosilicate glass with elegant floral designs for a stylish and durable drinking experience.
Double-walled insulation keeps beverages hot or cold longer while preventing scalding with an anti-scald handle.
Crystal clear showcases vibrant colors of your drinks, perfect for afternoon tea or any beverage.
Hand-collected real flowers encapsulated within the glass create a unique, everlasting gift for coffee and tea lovers.
Available in lightweight 220ml and 300ml sizes, combining high capacity with comfortable, smooth round mouth design.

title: 【Dusk123】 Espresso Powder Stirrer Coffee Stirrer Needle Coffee Powder Distributor Needle Espresso Coffee Tamper Coffee tools
detail_text: Product Highlights Feature: Use a fine needle or similar tool to stir the ground coffee in the basket, you can place a powder ring to prevent the ground coffee from being stirred out. The stirring action breaks up the agglomerates that occur when the coffee beans are ground, and at the same time distributes the coffee more evenly throughout the bed. This can improve the channel effect, making the extraction more uniform and the extraction rate higher. After testing, any tool larger than 1mm in diameter will have the opposite effect, such as toothpicks. In addition, it is also essential to use the powder needle to stir the powder evenly and carefully.
detail_html:
Product Highlights

  • Feature: Use a fine needle or similar tool to stir the ground coffee in the basket, you can place a powder ring to prevent the ground coffee from being stirred out.
  • The stirring action breaks up the agglomerates that occur when the coffee beans are ground, and at the same time distributes the coffee more evenly throughout the bed.
  • This can improve the channel effect, making the extraction more uniform and the extraction rate higher.
  • After testing, any tool larger than 1mm in diameter will have the opposite effect, such as toothpicks.
  • In addition, it is also essential to use the powder needle to stir the powder evenly and carefully.

title: G40322 600W Portable Electric Portable Water Heater Coffee Tea Immersion Auto
detail_text: Condition: 100% Brand New Heater Tube Size(L x W): approx. 155 x 33mm Rated Power: 600W Rated Voltage: 220V Total Length: approx. 1m / 3.28ft Color: Yellow Material: Stainless Steel Applicable: This is the national standard, and other countries need to be equipped with adapters Features: Made of stainless steel material, rust resistant, high hardness, heat resistant, safe and ensure healthy and clean water. Quick and safe to heat water, very convenient to use. High working efficiency and low energy consumption. Moderate size is perfect to heat water or coffee in the cup or tea kettle. Suitable for household, office, university dorm or travel use. National standard plug, other countries need to be equipped with adapter How to Use: 1. Fill container with water, immerse the heating element into water and then power on. 2. Pull the power supply after the water is boil, but don't bring out the heater from the water immediately, should wait for 20 seconds. Note: 1. Do not put your hands into water container when the item is working. 2. Do not run water container dry with the item. Package Included: 1 x Electric Water Heater
detail_html:
Condition: 100% Brand New

Heater Tube Size(L x W): approx. 155 x 33mm

Rated Power: 600W

Rated Voltage: 220V

Total Length: approx. 1m / 3.28ft

Color: Yellow

Material: Stainless Steel

Applicable: This is the national standard, and other countries need to be equipped with adapters


Features:

Made of stainless steel material, rust resistant, high hardness, heat resistant, safe and ensure healthy and clean water.

Quick and safe to heat water, very convenient to use.

High working efficiency and low energy consumption.

Moderate size is perfect to heat water or coffee in the cup or tea kettle.

Suitable for household, office, university dorm or travel use.

National standard plug, other countries need to be equipped with adapter

How to Use:

1. Fill container with water, immerse the heating element into water and then power on.

2. Pull the power supply after the water is boil, but don't bring out the heater from the water immediately, should wait for 20 seconds.

Note:

1. Do not put your hands into water container when the item is working.

2. Do not run water container dry with the item.

Package Included:

1 x Electric Water Heater
